title: 我正在…
prompt_en: Practice present continuous for I am doing actions.
prompt_zh: 练习现在进行时"I am doing"表达。
description: 掌握I'm eating/drinking/reading等现在进行时第一人称表达。
knowledge_points: 现在进行时 第一人称 I am doing 此刻
teaching_markdown:
## 现在进行时结构：I am + 动词-ing
- **I'm eating breakfast right now.** 我正在吃早餐。
- **I'm drinking coffee right now.** 我正在喝咖啡。
- **I'm reading a great book.** 我正在读一本好书。

## 对比：习惯 vs 此刻
- I eat breakfast every day.（习惯）
- I'm eating breakfast right now.（此刻）

## 关键规则
- be动词(am)绝对不能少：❌ I eating → ✅ I'm eating
- 动词必须加-ing：❌ I'm eat → ✅ I'm eating

title: 他/她正在…
prompt_en: Practice present continuous for He/She is doing actions.
prompt_zh: 练习现在进行时第三人称"他/她正在"表达。
description: 掌握He's/She's working/sleeping/teaching等现在进行时第三人称表达。
knowledge_points: 现在进行时 第三人称 He is She is 正在
teaching_markdown:
## 第三人称现在进行时：He/She is + 动词-ing
- **He's working from home today.** 他今天在家办公。
- **She's teaching a class right now.** 她正在上课。
- **He's driving to the airport now.** 他正开往机场。

## 对比：长期 vs 此刻
- He works in an office.（长期）
- He's working from home today.（此刻例外）

## 常见错误
- ❌ He working. → ✅ He's working.
- ❌ She is teach. → ✅ She is teaching.

title: 此刻场景描述
prompt_en: Practice describing scenes happening right now.
prompt_zh: 练习描述此刻正在发生的场景。
description: 掌握It's raining/People are waiting/太阳闪耀等场景描述表达。
knowledge_points: 现在进行时 场景描述 天气 此刻
teaching_markdown:
## 场景描述核心句型
- **It's raining outside right now.** 外面正在下雨。
- **People are waiting in line.** 人们正在排队。
- **The sun is shining today!** 今天阳光明媚！

## 观察描述
Look! / Listen! 开头常暗示进行时。
- Look! It's raining.
- Listen! The baby is crying.

## 替换练习
替换天气/动作词。

title: 感官动词对比
prompt_en: Practice look/feel/think vs look at/feel/think about contrast.
prompt_zh: 练习感官动词两种用法对比：看起来vs正在看、觉得vs正在感受。
description: 掌握感官动词状态用法和动作用法的区别。
knowledge_points: 感官动词 状态 动作 对比 think feel look
teaching_markdown:
## 感官动词两种用法
- **He looks happy in photos.** 他照片里看起来开心。(状态)
- **He's looking at his phone.** 他正在看手机。(动作)
- **She thinks it's a good idea.** 她觉得是好主意。(状态)
- **She's thinking about the problem.** 她正在思考问题。(动作)

## 关键区分
- look = 看起来(状态) vs look at = 看(动作)
- think = 认为(状态) vs think about = 思考(动作)
- feel = 觉得(状态) vs feel = 感受(动作可进行)

title: 此刻与习惯对比
prompt_en: Practice switching between habit and right now.
prompt_zh: 练习在习惯和此刻之间切换时态。
description: 掌握I usually...but right now I'm...双时态对比表达。
knowledge_points: 时态对比 习惯 此刻 usually but now
teaching_markdown:
## 双时态对比句型
- **I usually watch TV after dinner, but right now I'm watching a movie.** 我通常晚饭后看电视，但此刻在看电影。
- **I study English every day, but I'm studying for a test now.** 我每天学英语，但此刻在备考。

## 对比标志词
- 习惯：usually / every day / every morning / always
- 此刻：right now / at the moment / now / today

## 练习技巧
先快速判断习惯"还是"此刻"，再选择时态。"
ink_script_key: practice_foundation-present-continuous_此刻正在做_此刻与习惯对比

title: 平时vs今天
prompt_en: Practice simple present vs present continuous for habits vs today.
prompt_zh: 练习一般现在时和现在进行时对比：平时习惯 vs 今天例外。
description: 掌握usually...but today...对比句式。
knowledge_points: 平时 今天 对比 习惯 临时 usually but today
teaching_markdown:
## 核心对比：习惯 vs 临时
- **I usually take the bus.** 我通常坐公交。
- **But today I'm taking a taxi.** 但今天我打车。

## 更多对比
- I live in Beijing. But I'm staying in Shanghai this week.
- We usually eat at home. But we're eating out tonight.

## 关键词
习惯词：usually/normally/generally
临时词：today/tonight/this week/this month

title: 常态vs例外
prompt_en: Practice contrasting normal vs exception with simple present and continuous.
prompt_zh: 练习常态和例外的时态对比表达。
description: 掌握常态vs例外的时态对比句式。
knowledge_points: 常态 例外 对比 时态 今天 例外
teaching_markdown:
## 常态 vs 例外核心句型
- **She wears a uniform at work, but today she's wearing a dress.** 她上班穿制服，但今天穿了裙子。
- **He usually gets up at 7, but he's getting up at 5 tomorrow.** 他通常7点起，但明天5点起。
- **They usually meet on Fridays, but this week they're meeting on Thursday.** 他们通常周五见，这周周四见。

## 替换练习
替换动词和名词，保持对比结构。

title: 此刻状态
prompt_en: Practice describing current states with present continuous.
prompt_zh: 练习用现在进行时描述此刻状态。
description: 掌握此刻天气/感受/状态的时态表达。
knowledge_points: 此刻状态 进行时 天气 感受 正在
teaching_markdown:
## 此刻状态核心句型
- **It's raining right now.** 现在正在下雨。
- **It's getting dark. Let's go inside.** 天快黑了，进去吧。
- **I'm feeling really tired now.** 我现在好累。
- **The baby is sleeping now.** 宝宝正在睡觉。

## 对比：常态 vs 此刻
- It rains a lot in spring.（季节特征）
- It's raining right now.（此刻天气）
- I feel tired after work.（常态）
- I'm feeling really tired now.（此刻感受）

title: 近期变化
prompt_en: Practice describing recent changes with continuous.
prompt_zh: 练习用进行时描述近期变化。
description: 掌握进行时描述近期变化和临时情况的表达。
knowledge_points: 近期变化 进行时 this month 临时
teaching_markdown:
## 近期变化核心句型
- **I normally walk to school, but I'm riding a bike this month.** 我平时走路去学校，但这个月骑自行车。
- **I usually work in Beijing, but this week I'm working in Shanghai.** 我通常在北京工作，但这周在上海。

## 关键点
进行时描述的是**临时/近期**的变化，不是永久改变。
- 临时：I'm staying in Shanghai this week.
- 永久：I live in Shanghai.（一般现在时）

title: 双时态叙事
prompt_en: Practice narrating with mixed tenses.
prompt_zh: 练习双时态叙事：用两种时态交替描述场景。
description: 掌握在叙事中自然切换一般现在和现在进行时。
knowledge_points: 时态混合 叙事 切换 think is doing
teaching_markdown:
## 双时态叙事核心句型
- **I think she is a good teacher.** 我觉得她是好老师。(状态)
- **Right now I'm thinking about the lesson.** 我正在想这节课。(动作)
- **I think he is sleeping. He usually takes a nap at this time.** 我觉得他在睡觉，他通常这个时间午休。

## 叙事模式
先描述已知/习惯(一般现在时)，再切换到此刻观察(现在进行时)。

title: 总是/通常/经常
prompt_en: Practice frequency adverbs: always/usually/often.
prompt_zh: 练习频率副词：总是/通常/经常。
description: 掌握always/usually/often与一般现在时搭配。
knowledge_points: 频率副词 always usually often 一般现在时
teaching_markdown:
## 频率副词核心句型
- **I always get up at 7.** 我总是7点起床。(100%)
- **I usually drink coffee in the morning.** 我通常早上喝咖啡。(90%)
- **I often read before bed.** 我经常睡前看书。(70%)

## 位置规则
频率副词放在**动词前**：
- ❌ I get up always at 7.
- ✅ I always get up at 7.
- ✅ I usually drink coffee.

title: 有时/很少/从不
prompt_en: Practice sometimes/rarely/never with simple present.
prompt_zh: 练习频率副词：有时/很少/从不。
description: 掌握sometimes/rarely/never与一般现在时搭配。
knowledge_points: 频率副词 sometimes rarely never 频率
teaching_markdown:
## 频率副词核心句型
- **I sometimes watch TV after work.** 我有时下班后看电视。(50%)
- **I rarely eat junk food.** 我很少吃垃圾食品。(10%)
- **I never smoke.** 我从不抽烟。(0%)

## 频率光谱
always(100%) → usually(90%) → often(70%) → sometimes(50%) → rarely(10%) → never(0%)

## 注意
never = not ever，后面不用再加not。❌ I never don't eat meat。

title: 频率+进行时混合
prompt_en: Practice mixing frequency with present continuous.
prompt_zh: 练习频率副词和现在进行时混合表达。
description: 掌握频率+进行时混合表达对比。
knowledge_points: 频率副词 进行时 混合 对比 usually but
teaching_markdown:
## 混合句型
- **I usually walk to work, but this month I'm taking the bus.** 我通常走路上班，但这个月坐公交。
- **I think he is sleeping. He usually takes a nap at this time.** 我觉得他在睡觉，他通常这个时间午休。

## 核心对比
频率副词 + 一般现在时 = 习惯
但 + 现在进行时 = 临时例外
练习先想这是习惯还是临时"，再选择时态。"

title: be+频率副词
prompt_en: Practice frequency adverb position with be verbs.
prompt_zh: 练习频率副词在be动词后的位置。
description: 掌握be动词+频率副词的语序。
knowledge_points: 频率副词 be动词 位置 always is
teaching_markdown:
## be+频率副词位置
频率副词放在be动词**之后**：
- **She is always late for class.** 她上课总是迟到。
- **He is never tired in the morning.** 他早上从不疲倦。

## 语法规则
- 普通动词：频率副词在动词前（I always get up early）
- be动词：频率副词在be后（She is always happy）

## 替换练习
is always / is never / are usually / is sometimes + 形容词

title: 频率问句
prompt_en: Practice How often questions.
prompt_zh: 练习How often频率问句。
description: 掌握How often问句和频率回答。
knowledge_points: 频率问句 How often 频率 回答
teaching_markdown:
## 频率问句核心句型
- **How often do you exercise? — I usually go running three times a week.** 你多久运动一次？——我通常每周跑三次。

## 回答方式
- 频率副词：always / usually / often / sometimes / rarely / never
- 频率短语：every day / once a week / twice a month / three times a year

## 替换练习
替换动词和频率表达方式。

title: have状态用法
prompt_en: Practice have for possession (stative
prompt_zh: no continuous).
duration_sec: 练习have表拥有的状态用法（不能用于进行时）。
description: L1~L2
knowledge_points: 掌握have表示拥有/关系/特征时不可用进行时。
teaching_markdown: have 拥有 状态 不可进行 语法
ink_script_key:
## have 状态用法（不可进行时）
- **I have a car.** 我有一辆车。(❌ I'm having a car)
- **I have two brothers.** 我有两个兄弟。(❌ I'm having two brothers)
- **I have a headache.** 我头疼。(❌ I'm having a headache)
- **She has blue eyes.** 她有蓝眼睛。(❌ She's having blue eyes)

## 核心规则
have表示拥有/关系/特征/状态"时，是**状态动词**，不能用于进行时。

scene_title: 🚫 绝对不能说：I'm having a car."
title: practice_foundation-present-continuous_have与get_have状态用法
have动作用法
prompt_en: Practice have for actions (eating/experiencing
prompt_zh: CAN use continuous).
duration_sec: 练习have表吃/经历的动作用法（可以用于进行时）。
description: L1~L2
knowledge_points: 掌握have表示吃/参加/经历时可以用进行时。
teaching_markdown: have 动作 吃 经历 可进行 进行时
ink_script_key:
## have 动作用法（可进行时）
- **I have breakfast at 7.** / **I'm having breakfast right now.** 我7点吃早餐。/ 我正在吃早餐。
- **I have a meeting at 3.** / **I'm having a meeting right now.** 我3点有会。/ 我正在开会。
- **I have a good time at parties.** / **I'm having a great time!** 我派对上玩得开心。/ 我正玩得很开心！

## 核心区分
- have + 食物/饮品 = 吃/喝（动作，可进行）
- have + 活动/经历 = 参加/经历（动作，可进行）
- have + 物品/关系 = 拥有（状态，不可进行）

title: get起床/到达
prompt_en: Practice get for waking up and arriving.
prompt_zh: 练习get表示起床和到达的用法。
description: 掌握get up/get home/get to的时态对比用法。
knowledge_points: get up 起床 到达 get to get home
teaching_markdown:
## get 起床/到达核心句型
- **I get up at 7 every day.** / **I'm getting up now.** 我每天7点起。/ 我正在起床。
- **I get home at 6 pm.** / **I'm getting home now.** 我下午6点到家。/ 我快到家了。
- **I get to work by bus.** / **I'm getting to work by taxi today.** 我坐公交上班。/ 我今天打车到公司。

## get 含义
get up = 起床 / get home = 到家 / get to = 到达
每个都有习惯"和"正在"两个版本。"

title: get变得/收到
prompt_en: Practice get for becoming and receiving.
prompt_zh: 练习get表示变得和收到的用法。
description: 掌握get+形容词表示变化和get表示收到的表达。
knowledge_points: get 变得 收到 变化 进行时
teaching_markdown:
## get 变得/收到核心句型
- **I get tired easily.** / **I'm getting tired. Let's rest.** 我容易累。/ 我有点累了，休息吧。
- **It gets dark early in winter.** / **It's getting dark. Let's go inside.** 冬天黑得早。/ 天快黑了，进去吧。
- **I get a lot of emails at work.** / **I'm getting a lot of spam these days.** 我上班收很多邮件。/ 我最近收到好多垃圾邮件。

## get + 形容词 = 变得
表示慢慢变化"，常用进行时强调变化过程。

scene_title: get angry / get cold / get better / get darker"
title: practice_foundation-present-continuous_have与get_get变得收到
get短语动词
prompt_en: Practice get phrasal verbs like get along.
prompt_zh: 练习get短语动词如get along的用法。
description: 掌握get along with等短语动词的时态对比用法。
knowledge_points: get 短语动词 get along 相处 进行时
teaching_markdown:
## get 短语动词核心句型
- **He gets along well with everyone.** / **He's getting along better now.** 他跟谁都处得好。/ 他现在处得更好了。

## 常用get短语动词
- get along with = 与...相处
- get through = 度过/接通
- get over = 克服/恢复
- get together = 聚在一起
- get into = 进入/陷入

## 注意
get短语动词也遵循习惯用一般现在时，此刻或变化用进行时"的对比。"
